# grafana_assistant_skill (Resource)

Manages a Grafana Assistant skill.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "grafana_assistant_skill" "example" {
  name  = "Deploy readiness check"
  body  = <<-EOT
  1. Check deployment pipeline status.
  2. Verify SLO error budget before promoting.
  EOT
  scope = "tenant"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `body` (String) The skill content.
- `name` (String) The skill name.
- `scope` (String) Whether the resource is visible to the whole tenant (`tenant`) or only the creating user (`user`).

### Optional

- `allowed_tools` (Block List) MCP tools to auto-approve when this skill is invoked. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--allowed_tools))
- `context_items` (String) Optional JSON array of context items referenced by the skill.
- `include_in_knowledgebase` (Boolean) Whether the skill is included in the knowledgebase.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The UUID of the resource.

<a id="nestedblock--allowed_tools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `allowed_tools`

Required:

- `integration_id` (String) Integration UUID.
- `tool_name` (String) MCP tool name.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import grafana_assistant_skill.name "{{ id }}"
```
